layout_blueprint: Desktop Structure: A persistent 240px left sidebar groups navigation into Main, Ops, and Admin. The main workspace utilizes a max-width of 1600px for ultra-wide monitors, centering content with a slate-50 background. Screen 1 (Today Dashboard): A daily work hub utilizing a 12-column CSS grid. Top row features key metrics (Sales, Onboarding Progress). The main area splits into an Action Queue (Calls, Approvals) and a Communications panel (Chat, Shorts). Screen 2 (Sales Workspace): A split-pane CRM layout. The left pane (30%) lists sales records with status indicators; the right pane (70%) displays detailed submission data, pending approval cues, and next-action buttons. Screen 3 (Recruit Command Center): A dense, tabular data view combining Recruiting Pipeline and Onboarding Review. Features sticky column headers, inline status dropdowns, and bulk action checkboxes. Screen 4 (Recruit Invite Flow): A focused, single-column public page. Uses a wizard-style progression with clear step indicators, keeping recruits within the ecosystem via tokenized URLs. Screen 5 (University / My Path): A visual roadmap layout. Training modules, calls, and links are arranged chronologically as a clear enablement path with progress bars. Mobile Structure: The left sidebar converts to a bottom tab bar prioritizing Today, Log Sale, Calls, Chat, and My Path. Complex tables convert to stacked card lists with fixed-size tap targets (minimum 44px) to prevent text overflow.
visual_system: Color Tokens: Primary Shell is Navy (#0A1F44) for sidebar and global headers. Primary Action is Green (#8dc63f) for primary buttons and success states. Backgrounds use Slate-50 (#f8fafc) for the canvas and White (#ffffff) for content panels. Status Accents include Amber-500 for pending, Blue-500 for informational, and Red-500 for alerts. Typography: System sans-serif (Inter or native stack). Base size is 14px for high density, with 12px for metadata and tabular data. Headings are semi-bold and reserved for page titles and section headers. Spacing System: Strict 4px baseline grid. Standard padding inside panels is 16px (p-4 in Tailwind), reduced to 8px (p-2) for dense lists. Component Styling: Panels and cards use a maximum border radius of 8px (rounded-lg) with a subtle 1px border (border-slate-200) and no heavy drop shadows. Avoid nesting cards within cards; use flat dividers (border-b) to separate internal content. Iconography: Rely on text labels, simple CSS geometric shapes (circles for status, triangles for dropdowns), or minimal SVG paths without external dependencies. No emojis.
motion_plan: Micro-interactions: Hover, focus, and press states utilize a 150ms ease-in-out transition. Buttons and links shift background color or border color subtly. Row hovers in tables apply a slate-50 background instantly, fading out over 150ms. Macro-transitions: Sheet openings, modal reveals, and tab switching use a 250ms to 320ms ease-out transition. Modals slide up slightly (translate-y-2 to translate-y-0) while fading in. Status Indicators: Progress bars (e.g., in My Path or Onboarding) use a 500ms ease-out width transition on load. Active states (like the current navigation item) feature a subtle left-border highlight that scales vertically over 200ms. Constraints: No looping animations, bouncing effects, glowing shadows, or confetti. All motion must be wrapped in prefers-reduced-motion media queries to disable transforms and default to instant state changes for accessibility.
implementation_notes: Tech Stack: Pure HTML5 and Tailwind CSS via CDN. No build step required. Layout Execution: Use flexbox for the main app shell (flex-row for desktop, flex-col for mobile). Use CSS Grid for the Today Dashboard (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12) to manage widget placement. Component Architecture: Build reusable utility classes for standard elements. For example, primary buttons use 'bg-[#8dc63f] hover:bg-[#7ab034] text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors duration-150'. Status badges use 'inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium border'. Data Tables: Implement using standard HTML table elements with 'w-full text-left border-collapse'. Use 'border-b border-slate-200' on table rows instead of wrapping rows in cards. Mobile Responsiveness: Hide the desktop sidebar using 'hidden md:flex'. Show the bottom navigation bar using 'flex md:hidden fixed bottom-0 w-full'. Ensure all interactive elements on mobile have a minimum height of 44px for touch targets. Assets: No external images. Use CSS gradients or solid colors for avatars (e.g., 'bg-slate-300 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-slate-600').
